model_specification_line: sm.WLS(df['full_time_emp'], sm.add_constant(pd.concat([df[['daca_post','daca_eligible','post','age_centered','age_centered_sq','year_centered']], pd.get_dummies(df['statefip'], prefix='state', drop_first=True)], axis=1).astype(float)), weights=df['perwt']).fit()
sample_selection: year between 2006 and 2016, hispan == 1, bpl == 200, birthyr between 1981 and 1997, age between 15 and 40, yrimmig >= 1900, perwt > 0
Mexico-born respondents who arrived before age 16 (yrimmig - birthyr <= 15) and before 2007
Full-time employment measured as empstat == 1 and usual hours between 35 and 98
